parsedContent.title: Primary Science Exam
parsedContent.description: A basic science exam for primary students

questions.text: What is the largest planet in our solar system?
What is the process called when plants make their own food from sunlight?
Describe the water cycle and its importance to our planet.
questions.correctAnswer: The water cycle is the process by which water is circulated between the Earth and the atmosphere. It involves evaporation, condensation, and precipitation, and is essential for life on Earth.

questions.text: What is the main function of the roots of a plant?
questions.correctAnswer: To absorb water and nutrients from the soil

questions.text: The ___ is the largest mammal on Earth.
Match the following animals with their habitats: lion - ___ , penguin - ___ , fish - ___
Put the following stages of a butterfly's life cycle in order: pupa, larva, adult, egg
